{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320161222A5E375C35CDD890A52C1\"}"},"total":44},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257119887042396940","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"吴晗先生和其同伴的经典大作，读之有幸。可以说这是一部超级大通史吧，从北京猿人写到北伐战争，记载了所有的重要历史事件、文史常识、典章制度。是学习中国文化历史的教科书一般的经典书籍。每一编都非常的通俗易懂，比如讲商鞅变法这一节，就像叙述一个有趣的故事一样跌宕起伏，有理有据，事无巨细。对于变法的具体条目也进行了清晰的列举，便于我们窥见变法全貌，并据此对变法进行客观分析。非常值得珍藏的巨著，意义非凡。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689680026,"group_id":"6895619586700348429","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5BP5kxaGvr5n7WMeoE1ZrM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"759107928722205","user_name":"不快不慢的容仁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"759107928722205","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6895619586700348429","book_info":{"abstract":"吴晗于1963年至1965年间组织了一批专家学者，如著名历史学家汪篯、白寿彝、邓广铭、郑天挺、翁独健、胡厚宣、阴法鲁、何兹全、戴逸等，他们一起整理、编写了这部《中国历史常识》，从北京猿人一直写到北伐战争，几乎囊括了中国历史上所有的重要事件、文史常识、典章制度等，是学习中国历史和传统文化的经典读物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e7a389aae0db815b6a702403d0c90628~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吴晗","author_id":"","book_id":"6895619586700348429","book_name":"中国历史常识","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"20.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":241,\"name\":\"历史文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241\u0026name=历史文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475287500127226905","read_count":"1037","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"331469"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"279","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7a389aae0db815b6a702403d0c90628~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178342\u0026x-signature=bgjTngVi8dnYBOtgdhsFXvbA210%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320161222A5E375C35CDD890A52C1\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3787},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7369036474415416089","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从这部书中让人更懂透了些历史，尤其是近代史。更尤其的是还从此中追寻到了《革命军》一书。也就是这是部兼容并包了好多，引导人懂得更多的书，也是可备作查史略之书的一部好书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715741537,"group_id":"6895619586700348429","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人爱好写作，有一部已完成近百万字的尚未完成的小说，想投稿。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3gL3Dd3L5pXBYEPU8dpoZA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"998820744018989","user_name":"科孚岛的祖池"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"998820744018989","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6895619586700348429","book_info":{"abstract":"吴晗于1963年至1965年间组织了一批专家学者，如著名历史学家汪篯、白寿彝、邓广铭、郑天挺、翁独健、胡厚宣、阴法鲁、何兹全、戴逸等，他们一起整理、编写了这部《中国历史常识》，从北京猿人一直写到北伐战争，几乎囊括了中国历史上所有的重要事件、文史常识、典章制度等，是学习中国历史和传统文化的经典读物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e7a389aae0db815b6a702403d0c90628~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吴晗","author_id":"","book_id":"6895619586700348429","book_name":"中国历史常识","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"20.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":241,\"name\":\"历史文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241\u0026name=历史文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7475287500127226905","read_count":"1037","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"331469"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"279","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7a389aae0db815b6a702403d0c90628~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178342\u0026x-signature=bgjTngVi8dnYB
